_comment: Hand-authored model for IProcedure. RTGen cannot parse coretypes/procedure.h (the ProcCall function-pointer typedef trips its C++ grammar, which is why upstream run_rtgen.sh leaves it commented out). This mirrors the fields the Dart generator reads (see opendaq_codegen/lib/src/model.dart): the single `dispatch(IBaseObject* params)` method. The callback-creation factory is emitted from the Target's CallbackSpec, not from this model.
